title: PolyQ: Codesigning End-to-End Quantization Framework for Scalable Edge CPU LLM Inference
summary: CPUs are the most universal target for on-device LLM inference, but existing low-bit quantization methods offer either coarse operating points or fine-grained mixed precision that is difficult to execute efficiently on CPUs. We present PolyQ, a CPU-oriented compiler/quantization co-design for activation-aware channel-wise bit allocation under a user-specified average-bit budget. PolyQ assigns per-channel bit-widths from $\{2,3,4,8,16\}$, then uses a compile-time model compiler to permute and cluster channels into bit-homogeneous blocks, generate SIMD- and LUT-compatible kernels, and merge compatible permutations across operators to keep layout regularization off the runtime path. This turns fine-grained budget fitting into a practical fractional-bit deployment method for CPU-only inference. Across Falcon-H1-3B, Llama2-13B, and Qwen3-32B on WikiText-2, PolyQ provides stable quality scaling from 3--6\,b and improves perplexity by 2.4--32.1\% over prior methods at a 3\,b target. End-to-end measurements on three representative CPUs -- workstation, laptop, and mobile -- show that compiler layout regularization reduces activation reorder traffic by up to 70.8\%, prefill latency and decode throughput scale nearly proportionally with the configured bit budget, and energy/token overhead stays below 2\% relative to an optimized LUT-based back-end. These results show that fractional-bit CPU deployment is practical, predictable, and energy-efficient across diverse edge targets.

AI.tldr: CPU端LLM推理的编译器/量化协同设计，实现分数比特部署。
AI.motivation: 现有低比特量化方法要么粗粒度，要么细粒度混合精度难以在CPU上高效执行。
AI.method: 硬件平台：CPU（工作站、笔记本、移动端）；关键技术：激活感知的通道级比特分配（{2,3,4,8,16}）、编译时通道排列与聚类、SIMD/LUT内核生成、算子间排列合并；实现层级：编译器/量化协同。
AI.result: 在Falcon-H1-3B、Llama2-13B、Qwen3-32B上，3b目标下困惑度改善2.4-32.1%；激活重排流量降低70.8%；prefill延迟和解码吞吐与比特预算近似线性缩放；能量/令牌开销低于2%。
AI.conclusion: 分数比特CPU部署在多种边缘目标上是实用、可预测且节能的。
AI.problem: CPU上低比特量化缺乏高效且细粒度的比特分配与执行方法。
AI.hardware: CPU（工作站、笔记本、移动端），无GPU，互联未提及。
key_results: 困惑度改善2.4-32.1%（3b目标 vs 先前方法）
激活重排流量降低70.8%
prefill延迟和解码吞吐与比特预算近似线性缩放
能量/令牌开销低于2%
AI.baseline: 先前低比特量化方法（未具体命名）
AI.measurement: 模型：Falcon-H1-3B、Llama2-13B、Qwen3-32B；数据集：WikiText-2；指标：困惑度、激活重排流量、prefill延迟、解码吞吐、能量/令牌；CPU类型：工作站、笔记本、移动端。
AI.value_7xthor: 量化方法可移植到Jetson Thor的CPU核上，但Thor主要依赖GPU，CPU推理非主要场景，关联有限。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，因为不涉及GPU互联。
AI.differentiation: 聚焦CPU量化，与7×Thor的GPU推理场景差异大，但编译器优化思路（如排列合并）可启发GPU上类似优化。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文聚焦CPU推理，与7×Thor的GPU分布式推理场景不直接相关，且无通信/调度/容错贡献。

title: Ground-Side Mission Plan Compilation with Policy-as-Code Guardrails for Cloud-Native Satellite Platforms
comment: 13 pages. Extended version of the paper accepted at IEEE SMC-IT/SCC 2026 (Space Mission Challenges for Information Technology / Space Computing Conference); adds a unified GPU+CPU DRA quota and a scheduler-level accelerator fallback re-validated on Kueue v0.18.3
summary: Onboard cloud-native runtimes for satellites are emerging on multiple tracks (ORCHIDE, Axiom Space's AxDCU-1, Kepler's Jetson nodes), but each assumes that the workflow artifacts it executes arrive from the ground. ORCHIDE's architecture document D3.1 states explicitly that "only the Deferred Phase is part of the ORCHIDE scope," and no open-source ground-side toolchain has been released by the consortium. We present Satellite Mission Compiler, a four-stage pipeline that addresses this gap: it takes a human-authored mission plan, checks it against machine-checkable structural and policy rules, and compiles it into the container-workflow artifacts that cloud-native satellite runtimes consume. The pipeline parses the plan against a Pydantic schema derived from public ORCHIDE materials, evaluates it against an OPA/Rego policy package of ten deny rules with documented provenance, compiles it into a typed WorkflowIntent intermediate representation, and renders it as Argo Workflow DAGs and Kueue Job manifests with Dynamic Resource Allocation (DRA) support. We classify pre-uplink loss events into four severity tiers tied to specific schema and policy checks, and anchor the layered-validation design in the safety reading of defense-in-depth (NASA-STD-8739.8B) rather than the security reading (NIST SP 800-53). The implementation is validated by golden translation evaluations, argo lint, an in-process baseline that reproduces OPA's decisions, and live single-node cluster submission, including a DRA-backed GPU admission cascade on Kueue v0.17.3 (re-validated on v0.18.3) and, on v0.18.3, a unified GPU+CPU device-class quota with a scheduler-level accelerator fallback. Six Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools expose the pipeline to AI agents. The compiler is released under EUPL-1.2 (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21228150).

AI.tldr: 卫星任务编译器将人类任务计划编译为云原生运行时工件，填补地面工具链空白。
AI.motivation: 现有卫星云原生运行时（如ORCHIDE）仅处理延迟阶段，缺乏开源地面工具链将任务计划编译为运行时工件。
AI.method: 四阶段流水线：解析任务计划（Pydantic schema）、OPA/Rego策略检查、编译为WorkflowIntent中间表示、渲染为Argo Workflow DAG和Kueue Job清单（支持DRA）。验证包括golden translation、argo lint、单节点集群提交。
AI.result: 通过golden translation评估、argo lint、单节点集群提交验证，包括DRA支持的GPU准入级联（Kueue v0.17.3/v0.18.3）和统一GPU+CPU设备类配额。
AI.conclusion: Satellite Mission Compiler提供了首个开源地面工具链，将任务计划编译为云原生卫星运行时工件。
AI.problem: 缺乏开源地面工具链将人类任务计划编译为云原生卫星运行时工件。
key_results: golden translation评估通过
argo lint通过
单节点集群提交成功，包括DRA-backed GPU admission cascade on Kueue v0.17.3（v0.18.3重新验证）
v0.18.3上统一GPU+CPU设备类配额与调度器加速器回退
AI.measurement: 实验配置：单节点集群；验证方法：golden translation、argo lint、in-process baseline（复现OPA决策）、live cluster submission。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限。该工作聚焦卫星任务编译，不涉及分布式推理的通信、调度或容错。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用。该工作不涉及分布式推理或互联约束。

title: Low-Latency Relay Selection in NR-V2X Vehicular Communications via Graph Isomorphism Networks with Edge Features
summary: Reliable, low-latency uplink connectivity is a key requirement for C-V2X networks in dense urban environments, where fast channel variations and blockages often degrade direct vehicle-to-infrastructure links. Multi-hop relaying can restore coverage, but relay-link activation under radio, capacity, and routing constraints results in an NP-hard optimisation problem, typically solved via Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP), whose runtime scales poorly with graph size. This paper introduces an edge-aware Learning-to-Optimise framework for real-time relay selection. Each V2X snapshot is modelled as a directed graph: node features encode vehicle state and traffic demand, while edge features capture radio-link capacity. An offline MILP oracle generates optimal relay configurations that supervise a Graph Isomorphism Network with Edge Features (GINE), enabling edge-level relay activation through a single forward pass, with tightly bounded inference latency. To bridge learning and exact optimisation, we also propose a hybrid GINE-Pruned MILP (GP-MILP) strategy in which GINE predictions prune the MILP search space. Experiments on a large-scale dataset generated via an OSM-SUMO-GEMV$^2$ pipeline show that GINE closely matches MILP decisions at the link level (accuracy 0.9589), F1-score (0.9544) on validation) and yields consistent end-to-end connectivity gains over a 1-hop MILP baseline (up to 9.2% with four RSUs and 12% with two RSUs). Inference latency remains tightly bounded, with all evaluated instances completing within 5~ms. Moreover, GP-MILP preserves MILP-equivalent solutions (same objective value) while achieving solver runtimes below 30~ms for more than 98%) of the graph instances, making MILP-grade optimisation compatible with stringent NR-V2X latency budgets.

AI.tldr: 用图神经网络加速C-V2X中继选择，推理延迟<5ms，精度接近MILP。
AI.motivation: C-V2X网络中继选择是NP-hard问题，MILP求解器在大图上扩展性差，无法满足低延迟要求。
AI.method: 硬件平台未明确；提出GINE网络进行边缘级中继激活，单次前向推理；混合GP-MILP策略用GINE剪枝MILP搜索空间。
AI.result: GINE链路级准确率0.9589，F1-score 0.9544；端到端连接增益最高12%（vs 1跳MILP）；推理延迟<5ms；GP-MILP在98%实例上求解时间<30ms且保持最优解。
AI.conclusion: 学习优化方法可在毫秒级实现接近MILP的中继选择，适用于低延迟C-V2X。
AI.problem: C-V2X中继选择在密集城市环境中需实时求解，但MILP在大图上延迟过高。
key_results: GINE链路级准确率0.9589，F1-score 0.9544（验证集）
端到端连接增益：4个RSU时最高9.2%，2个RSU时最高12%（vs 1跳MILP基线）
推理延迟：所有实例<5ms
GP-MILP：98%实例求解时间<30ms，保持MILP最优解

AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，该论文不涉及GPU互联。

title: ChronoQG: Towards a Temporally Expressive and Hop-Bounded Benchmark for Temporal Knowledge Graph Question Generation
summary: Knowledge graph question generation (KGQG) aims to generate natural-language questions from structured graph evidence. Existing KGQG benchmarks, however, are mostly built on static knowledge graphs and do not encode the temporal scopes of graph facts. As a result, they cannot evaluate whether generated questions faithfully preserve temporal validity, event ordering, and answer-determining temporal constraints. In this paper, we study temporal knowledge graph question generation (TKGQG), where a generated question must be faithful to both the support subgraph and the temporal constraints required to identify the target answer. We propose ChronoQG, the first temporally expressive and hop-bounded benchmark construction framework for TKGQG. ChronoQG integrates a comprehensive temporal-constraint taxonomy, topology-temporal subgraph sampling, and trace-grounded question generation to construct temporally faithful questions. The framework produces four benchmark datasets from heterogeneous temporal knowledge graphs, totaling 16,011 verified questions. We evaluate representative LLM-based KGQG methods and prompting baselines across diverse TKGQG settings, including temporal-constraint counts, topological templates, and temporal-constraint types. The results show that existing methods struggle to preserve temporal constraints, especially under multi-constraint settings and harder temporal-constraint types. These findings reveal a clear gap between static KGQG and TKGQG, and establish ChronoQG as a challenging testbed for temporally faithful question generation.

AI.tldr: 提出首个时间知识图谱问题生成基准ChronoQG，揭示现有方法在时间约束保持上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有KGQG基准基于静态知识图，无法评估生成问题是否忠实于时间有效性、事件顺序和时间约束。
AI.method: 提出ChronoQG框架，包含时间约束分类、拓扑-时间子图采样和轨迹引导的问题生成，构建4个数据集共16011个问题。
AI.result: 现有LLM方法在多约束和困难时间约束类型下表现差，揭示静态KGQG与TKGQG之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: ChronoQG为时间忠实问题生成提供了挑战性测试平台。
AI.problem: 缺乏评估生成问题时间忠实性的基准。
AI.key_results: 现有方法在多约束和困难时间约束类型下表现差。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文主题为知识图谱问题生成，与分布式推理系统无关，无系统级贡献。

title: DRIFT: Direct Reduced Fourier Transforms for Distributed Spectral Neural Operators
summary: Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) learn solution operators for partial differential equations and offer orders of magnitude speedup over traditional numerical solvers at inference time, which makes them attractive surrogates for high-resolution computational physics. Scaling FNOs to high-resolution spatial grids requires distributing the data across GPUs, but the distributed FFT at the core of each spectral layer requires multiple dense all-to-all collectives that communicate the full spatial tensor, only for most coefficients to be discarded immediately. We introduce the Distributed Truncated Spectral Transform (DTST), which reverses this order. Each GPU computes only a small subset of frequency modes used by the spectral convolution locally via a partial DFT, and two collectives combine the results with a payload that depends only on this mode count, not the spatial resolution. DTST produces spectral coefficients identical to the standard distributed FFT with truncation, while providing both spatial data parallelism and spectral weight model parallelism. We present DRIFT, a GPU implementation of DTST for distributed Fourier Neural Operators, using separable per-dimension basis matrices and efficient GPU-to-GPU communication. On a 3D+time FNO across 4--32 GPUs, on up to 8 nodes (4 GPUs/node), DRIFT achieves a forward-pass speedup of 38--64$\times$ and a 37$\times$ training speedup over the distributed FNO baseline, reducing communication time from 97\% to under 6\% of the forward-pass time, with growing speedups at higher resolution.

AI.tldr: 提出DTST通信优化，使分布式FNO前向加速38-64倍，通信占比从97%降至6%。
AI.motivation: 分布式FNO中密集all-to-all通信开销巨大，且大部分系数被丢弃，通信效率低。
AI.method: 硬件平台：GPU集群（4-32 GPU，8节点，4 GPU/节点）；关键技术：分布式截断谱变换（DTST），先本地计算部分频率模式，再通过两个collective组合结果，通信负载仅依赖模式数而非空间分辨率；实现层级：系统/算子。
AI.result: 前向加速38-64倍，训练加速37倍，通信时间占比从97%降至6%以下，加速比随分辨率提高而增长。
AI.conclusion: DTST通过反转计算顺序显著降低分布式FNO的通信开销，实现高效扩展。
AI.problem: 分布式FNO中标准分布式FFT的all-to-all通信负载与空间分辨率成正比，导致高分辨率下通信成为瓶颈。
AI.hardware: GPU集群，4-32 GPU，最多8节点（4 GPU/节点），互联方式未明确（推测为以太网或InfiniBand）。
AI.comm_mechanism: 分布式截断谱变换（DTST），使用两个collective（推测为all-reduce或all-gather）组合局部结果，通信负载仅依赖截断模式数。
key_results: 前向传播加速38-64倍（4-32 GPU）
训练加速37倍
通信时间占比从97%降至6%以下
加速比随分辨率提高而增长
AI.baseline: 标准分布式FNO（使用分布式FFT+截断）
AI.measurement: 实验配置：3D+time FNO，4-32 GPU，最多8节点；指标：前向传播时间、训练时间、通信时间占比；未明确重复次数与置信区间。
AI.value_7xthor: DTST的通信优化思路（先本地计算部分结果，再通信组合）可借鉴到无NVLink的7×Thor上，用于减少分布式推理中all-to-all通信量，但需适配Transformer中的注意力机制而非FFT。
AI.infra_assumption: 多节点GPU集群，节点间高带宽互联（如InfiniBand），支持密集all-to-all通信。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 部分成立。DTST减少通信负载的原理（通信量仅依赖模式数）在以太网环境下同样有效，但具体加速比受限于以太网带宽和延迟，可能低于原文。
AI.differentiation: 将DTST思想应用于Transformer推理中的通信优化，例如在分布式注意力计算中先本地计算部分注意力分数，再通信组合，减少跨节点传输量。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文针对FNO而非LLM推理，通信模式（FFT）与Transformer不同，直接迁移性有限；但通信优化思路有参考价值，可作为背景阅读。

title: CODA: Algorithm-Hardware Co-design for Edge Video Diffusion via NMP-Enabled Compute-Cache Operator Disaggregation
comment: 15 pages, 14 figures, accepted to the 59th IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Microarchitecture (MICRO 2026)
summary: Deploying Video Diffusion Models (VDMs) on edge devices is appealing for localized and privacy-preserving generation, but their iterative Transformer-based denoising remains too slow for practical local inference. Cross-Timestep Caching (CTC) has emerged as a promising direction for reducing redundant computation, reusing activations across adjacent denoising steps rather than modifying model weights, while largely preserving generation fidelity. However, on memory-constrained edge GPUs, CTC requires a massive cache footprint that quickly exceeds on-device VRAM and forces the cache into host memory. More fundamentally, cache operators remain tightly interleaved and chain-dependent with native compute operators, so naive near-memory offloading still incurs repeated PCIe exchanges for residual and fusion computations, turning cache reuse into a communication- and serialization-bound execution flow. We therefore propose CODA, an algorithm-hardware co-designed architecture centered on Compute-Cache Operator Disaggregation. CODA separates dense compute paths and memory-bound cache paths across the xPU and a lightweight DIMM-side near-memory engine, reorganizes fragmented cache activity into hardware-friendly coalesced segments, and exploits Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) branch independence to overlap xPU compute with cache-side execution. Experiments show that CODA achieves up to 1.80x end-to-end speedup and 1.74x higher energy efficiency, while preserving competitive generation quality compared with a state-of-the-art caching algorithm.

AI.tldr: CODA通过计算-缓存算子分离加速边缘视频扩散模型推理。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备上视频扩散模型推理慢，CTC缓存占用大且缓存与计算算子紧耦合导致通信瓶颈。
AI.method: 硬件平台：边缘GPU（如Jetson系列）及DIMM端近存引擎；关键技术：计算-缓存算子分离、缓存合并、CFG分支重叠；实现层级：算法-硬件协同设计。
AI.result: 端到端加速比1.80x，能效提升1.74x，生成质量与SOTA缓存算法相当。
AI.conclusion: CODA通过解耦计算与缓存路径有效缓解边缘推理的通信和序列化瓶颈。
AI.problem: CTC在内存受限边缘GPU上缓存占用超VRAM，且缓存与计算算子紧耦合导致PCIe通信开销大。
AI.hardware: 边缘GPU（如Jetson系列），DIMM端近存引擎，互联为PCIe（无NVLink）。
AI.comm_mechanism: 计算-缓存算子分离，缓存合并，CFG分支重叠。
AI.memory_kv: 缓存占用大，需卸载到主机内存，论文未明确KV cache机制。
AI.key_results: 端到端加速比1.80x（vs SOTA缓存算法）；能效提升1.74x；生成质量（FID/IS）与基线相当。
AI.baseline: 与SOTA缓存算法（CTC）对比，测量口径为端到端推理时间和能耗。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：边缘GPU平台；负载：视频扩散模型；指标：端到端加速比、能效、生成质量（FID/IS）。
AI.value_7xthor: 计算-缓存算子分离思想可迁移至7×Thor，但需适配无NVLink的以太网环境，缓存卸载可能依赖主机内存。
AI.infra_assumption: 假设有PCIe连接和DIMM端近存引擎，边缘GPU内存有限。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 部分成立：无NVLink时PCIe带宽更低，缓存卸载通信开销更大，但算子分离和重叠策略仍可缓解瓶颈。
AI.differentiation: 在7×Thor上可研究缓存卸载的通信-计算重叠策略，量化PCIe带宽对缓存性能的影响。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文聚焦视频扩散模型，非LLM推理，且硬件假设（DIMM近存引擎）与7×Thor环境差异大，直接迁移价值有限。

title: LongStraw: Long-Context RL Beyond 2M Tokens under a Fixed GPU Budget
summary: A growing gap separates inference context lengths from RL post-training: inference systems are approaching million-token contexts, while post-training workloads often remain at 256K tokens or below and rely on length generalization at deployment. The gap is especially important for AI agents, whose observations, tool outputs, documents, and prior decisions accumulate over long trajectories. LongStraw is an architecture-aware execution stack for million-token RL post-training under a fixed GPU budget, instantiated with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). It evaluates the shared prompt without autograd, retains only model-specific state needed by later tokens, and replays short response branches one at a time, reducing the live training graph at the cost of additional replay time. We implement it for the hybrid recurrent and full-attention Qwen3.6-27B and the compressed-attention mixture-of-experts GLM-5.2. On eight H20 GPUs, LongStraw completes grouped Qwen scoring and response backward at 2.1M positions for groups of 2 and 8; increasing the group size adds only 0.21 GB of peak allocated memory, while a separate stress test reaches 4.46M positions. On 32 H20 GPUs, we validate the end-to-end LongStraw execution path for a 2.1M-token prompt across all 78 layers of GLM-5.2. These experiments establish execution capacity rather than complete training correctness because the captured prompt state is detached and some distributed forward and gradient composition paths remain incomplete.

AI.tldr: 面向百万token RL后训练的架构感知执行栈，固定GPU预算下实现长上下文训练。
AI.motivation: 推理上下文长度快速增长，但RL后训练仍限于短上下文，导致部署时长度泛化问题，尤其影响AI agent的长轨迹训练。
AI.method: 硬件平台：H20 GPU；关键技术：共享提示无autograd、仅保留模型特定状态、短响应分支逐条重放；实现层级：系统执行栈。

title: Closed-Loop Knowledge Dynamics: An Operational Framework for Saturation and Escape
summary: Feedback-driven loops support iterative improvement in large language models, reinforcement learning, and autonomous discovery, yet their gains often diminish under repeated internal feedback. We study why closed-loop knowledge systems saturate and what external information can move them beyond their current attractors. We introduce a three-level operational framework in which knowledge states $x_t$ evolve through transition kernels $K_θ$ indexed by a structural parameter $θ$. The governing structure is defined as the observational equivalence class of $θ$ induced by these kernels, while attractors and basins are properties of the fixed-$θ$ dynamics. A structural intervention changes $θ$ and produces a detectable kernel discrepancy on pre-specified probe states, making structural change falsifiable. Using a Lyapunov drift condition, we show that stable internal dynamics approach bounded stability regions with exponentially attenuated transients and a noise-controlled residual floor. We characterize escape through a metric condition on intervention-induced attractor displacement and a baseline-relative KL lower bound for increasing escape probability. This analysis also explains why conditional mutual information alone cannot certify escape: it measures variation among intervention-conditioned updates rather than departure from the no-intervention law. Case studies in LLM code repair, sparse-reward reinforcement learning, and Bayesian optimization use matched continuation controls to illustrate how feedback strength and alignment affect quality-improving escape. Our contribution is an operational connection among stability tools, measurable intervention effects, and cross-domain diagnostics.

AI.tldr: 提出三层次框架分析闭环知识系统饱和与结构干预逃逸条件。
AI.motivation: 研究闭环知识系统（如LLM、强化学习）在重复内部反馈下收益递减的原因，以及外部信息如何帮助系统逃离当前吸引子。
AI.method: 理论分析框架，无具体硬件平台。提出三层次操作框架，使用Lyapunov漂移条件、KL下界等数学工具分析结构干预的可检测性和逃逸条件。
AI.result: 理论结果：稳定内部动力学逼近有界稳定区域，瞬态指数衰减，噪声控制残差；结构干预可产生可检测的核差异；条件互信息不能保证逃逸。
AI.conclusion: 建立了稳定性工具、可测量干预效应和跨领域诊断之间的操作联系。
AI.problem: 闭环知识系统在重复内部反馈下性能饱和，缺乏系统级框架解释饱和机制和外部干预的逃逸条件。

title: Non-vacuous Generalization Bounds for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
summary: While reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is widely used to improve the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), the generalizability of the resulting models remains poorly understood. In this work, we establish the first non-vacuous generalization bounds for parameter-efficient RLVR fine-tuning at the billion-parameter scale. Our approach adapts PAC-Bayes compression bounds to this setting, and addresses the inherent stochasticity of token generation by applying the Gumbel-max reparameterization trick. To operationalize these bounds, we propose the Progressive RLVR framework, which integrates RLVR with on-policy distillation, TinyLoRA, and model quantization. Progressive RLVR empirically retains 84-97% performance of standard LoRA fine-tuning while producing models that are 14,796x more compressible. We show that this framework yields non-vacuous generalization bounds in four domains: mathematical problem-solving, programming, general-knowledge reasoning, and Text-to-SQL. Our bounds exceed the accuracy of the base model by 9-51% and lie within 6-11% of the accuracy of the fine-tuned models.

AI.tldr: 首个非平凡泛化界，证明参数高效RLVR微调的可压缩性与泛化性。
AI.motivation: 理解RLVR微调模型的泛化能力，建立理论保证。
AI.method: 硬件平台未明确；关键技术：PAC-Bayes压缩界、Gumbel-max重参数化、Progressive RLVR（含on-policy蒸馏、TinyLoRA、量化）；实现层级：算法/理论。
AI.result: Progressive RLVR保留84-97%性能，模型可压缩性提升14,796倍；泛化界超过基模9-51%，距微调模型6-11%。
AI.conclusion: 参数高效RLVR微调可在保持性能的同时获得可证明的泛化界。
AI.problem: 缺乏对RLVR微调模型泛化性的理论分析。
key_results: Progressive RLVR保留标准LoRA微调84-97%的性能
模型可压缩性提升14,796倍
泛化界超过基模9-51%
泛化界距微调模型6-11%

title: Auditing Fairness-Privacy Trade-offs: Subpopulation-Level Effects of Fairness-Enhancing Algorithms
summary: Machine learning (ML) models deployed in sensitive domains such as healthcare, law enforcement, and finance must satisfy not only utility requirements but also fairness and privacy guarantees. While prior work has largely examined how privacy-preserving techniques affect fairness, the inverse question-how fairness-enhancing algorithms influence privacy leakage-remains underexplored. We present the first comprehensive study of how fairness interventions affect membership inference privacy risks at the subpopulation level. By adapting the Likelihood Ratio Attack (LiRA) for subgroup auditing, we uncover privacy disparities that aggregate evaluations obscure. We further analyze how Differential Privacy (DP) interacts with fairness-enhancing methods across different categories, showing that DP's privacy benefits and utility costs are unevenly distributed across subpopulations. Our results demonstrate that fairness interventions do not uniformly increase privacy risk; their impact depends on model architecture, subgroup size, and mitigation strategy. These findings reveal that fairness, privacy, and utility must be jointly evaluated at the subpopulation level, and we introduce the first unified empirical framework to support such auditing in practice.

AI.tldr: 公平性干预对子群体成员推理隐私风险的影响研究
AI.motivation: 公平性增强算法如何影响隐私泄露（尤其是成员推理攻击）尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 采用似然比攻击（LiRA）进行子群体审计，分析差分隐私（DP）与公平性方法的交互。
AI.result: 公平性干预不统一增加隐私风险，影响取决于模型架构、子群体大小和缓解策略。
AI.conclusion: 公平性、隐私和效用必须在子群体层面联合评估。
AI.problem: 现有研究未在子群体层面评估公平性干预对隐私风险的影响。
AI.key_results: 公平性干预对隐私风险的影响非均匀；DP的隐私收益和效用成本在子群体间分布不均。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文主题为公平性与隐私，与受限边缘集群分布式推理无直接系统贡献。

title: The Cost and Network Limits of Space-Based AI Compute
summary: This paper evaluates whether large-scale AI data centers deployed in low-Earth orbit (LEO) could become a cost-effective alternative to terrestrial facilities. The analysis compares orbital and ground-based systems across launch cost, power generation, cooling, radiation exposure, and atmospheric reentry, as well as compute-network performance. A key distinction is the shift from terrestrial Clos networks to space-based mesh networks using laser inter-satellite links. Using bisection bandwidth, bisection intensity, and roofline-style models, we show that while LEO-based inference may be feasible, training frontier-scale LLMs in orbit is unlikely to be competitive with terrestrial data centers.

AI.tldr: 评估LEO太空数据中心作为地面替代方案的可行性，聚焦推理与训练成本。
AI.motivation: 探索低轨卫星数据中心能否成为地面数据中心的经济可行替代方案，解决地面设施的高能耗、冷却和土地成本问题。
AI.method: 采用对地轨道与地面系统在发射成本、发电、冷却、辐射、再入及计算网络性能方面的对比分析；使用对分带宽、对分强度和类屋顶线模型进行性能建模。
AI.result: LEO推理可能可行，但训练前沿LLM无法与地面数据中心竞争；具体量化指标未给出。
AI.conclusion: LEO数据中心在推理场景有潜力，但训练大规模模型不具竞争力。
AI.problem: 缺乏对LEO卫星网络环境下大模型推理与训练可行性的系统级量化评估。

title: Campaign Diagrams: Visualizing the March Through the Phases of a Workload
summary: We present campaign diagrams, a visualization technique for phase-level analysis of resource utilization and bottlenecks in modern workloads. Existing tools have a trade-off: rooflines aggregate a workload into a single point and lose all notion of time, while profilers and traces expose fine-grained events but obscure what bounds performance. Instead, a campaign diagram depicts compute throughput and memory bandwidth utilization, compute and memory traffic volume, and latency in a single figure. Since they can be generated from analytical models, simulations, or profiling data, campaign diagrams capture both ideal bounds and a kernel's achieved performance. We demonstrate them on two case studies: a low-rank GEMM, where they reveal the counterintuitive result that reducing operational intensity can improve end-to-end performance, and Mamba, where they expose fusion and pipelining opportunities across phases. In both cases, our visualization technique reveals optimization opportunities that are difficult to identify with rooflines or profilers alone.

AI.tldr: 提出campaign diagrams可视化技术，用于阶段级资源利用与瓶颈分析。
AI.motivation: 现有工具（roofline模型丢失时间信息，profiler/trace掩盖性能瓶颈）无法同时展示计算吞吐、内存带宽、流量和延迟。
AI.method: 基于分析模型、仿真或profiling数据生成campaign diagram，展示计算吞吐、内存带宽利用率、流量和延迟。案例：低秩GEMM和Mamba模型。
AI.result: 低秩GEMM中揭示降低运算强度可提升端到端性能；Mamba中暴露跨阶段融合和流水线机会。
AI.conclusion: Campaign diagrams能揭示roofline或profiler难以发现的优化机会。
AI.problem: 缺乏一种可视化方法能同时展示计算、内存、延迟的时序信息，并识别性能瓶颈。
AI.key_results: 低秩GEMM：降低运算强度可提升端到端性能；Mamba：暴露融合和流水线机会。
AI.measurement: 案例研究，无具体数值指标。
AI.value_7xthor: 可借鉴其可视化方法分析7×Thor上分布式推理的瓶颈，但需扩展至多节点通信。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 方法本身与互联无关，适用于任何硬件，但需适配多节点场景。
AI.differentiation: 将campaign diagram扩展到多节点分布式推理，加入通信带宽和延迟维度。
AI.deep_read_reason: 该论文是可视化方法，非系统级贡献，无量化结果，对7×Thor直接价值有限。

title: ExaGEMM: Exploration Framework for CPU-Driven ML Inference via Associative In-Register Computing for Low-Bit GEMM
summary: Low-bit GEMM is increasingly central to efficient ML inference, yet very-low-bit execution remains a poor fit for conventional CPUs. Practical deployment spans fragmented regimes-from 1/2/4-bit weights to varying activation precision-whose feasibility, reuse opportunity, and support cost differ under fixed SIMD and register-file budgets, making lightweight CPU support selection a first-class design problem. We present ExaGEMM, a workload-aware codesign and exploration framework for CPU-native low-bit GEMM via register-resident LUT execution. The key insight is that existing SIMD datapaths already cover table generation and accumulation; the only new hardware is an in-register select/feed mechanism with explicitly modeled cost. ExaGEMM co-explores parameterized kernels and lightweight SIMD ISA support using analytical models of register feasibility, compute cost, memory traffic, and hardware overhead, pruning the candidate space by 99.2% before simulation. It then identifies non-dominated support points and generates ISA specs, gem5 patches, and GEMM kernels for validation. Across representative ML models and CPU targets, ExaGEMM improves latency by 13.29x over software-only baselines, while showing that workload-aware frontier selection is especially important for mixed-precision LLM workloads.

AI.tldr: ExaGEMM通过寄存器驻留LUT执行实现CPU低比特GEMM，加速13.29倍。
AI.motivation: 低比特GEMM在CPU上执行效率低，现有SIMD架构对极低比特支持不足，需要轻量级硬件支持。
AI.method: 硬件平台：CPU（gem5模拟）；关键技术：寄存器驻留LUT执行、工作负载感知的协同设计；实现层级：硬件-软件协同设计（ISA扩展、内核生成）。
AI.result: 延迟提升13.29倍（vs软件基线），候选空间剪枝99.2%。
AI.conclusion: 工作负载感知的前沿选择对混合精度LLM负载尤为重要。
AI.problem: 现有CPU对极低比特GEMM支持碎片化，缺乏系统化的轻量级支持选择方法。
AI.hardware: CPU（gem5模拟），具体节点数、GPU型号、互联未明确。
AI.key_results: 延迟提升13.29倍（vs软件基线）；候选空间剪枝99.2%。
AI.baseline: 软件基线（纯软件低比特GEMM实现）。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：gem5模拟，代表ML模型和CPU目标；指标：延迟（倍数）。

AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，该工作聚焦CPU架构，与无NVLink以太网环境无关。

title: Transition-Aware Routing in Hybrid Hollow-Core/Single-Mode Fiber Networks: A Cost--Throughput Investigation
summary:
Incremental deployment of hollow-core fiber (HCF) in single-mode-fiber (SMF) networks introduces a routing tradeoff: reducing HCF-SMF transitions can improve
  physical-layer feasibility, but overly transition-averse routing incurs harmful path detours. We study this tradeoff using a common event-driven simulator
  that compares six protected routing schemes spanning fiber-blind, generalized signal-to-noise ratio (GSNR)-aware, and explicitly transition-aware designs on
  hybrid HCF/SMF topologies. The model includes a per-transition GSNR penalty and an exploratory splice-failure availability term. Across six reference
  topologies, five HCF deployment fractions, and dynamic loads at 300 Erlang, the strongest transition minimizers, transition-penalty-aware routing (TPAR) and
  the GSNR/fiber-transition joint scheme (GFJ), halve the mean transition count at a 20-25% carried-traffic penalty. Among the intermediate designs, GSNR-
  maximal routing with transition-aware reranking (GMR-T) cuts transitions by approximately 22% relative to distance-adaptive routing and spectrum assignment
  (DA-RSA) at a 3% throughput cost, while bounded-detour TPAR (BD-TPAR) cuts transitions by approximately 11% at only a 1% cost. Deployment pattern also
  matters: contiguous HCF rollout lowers transitions by approximately 40% on average while improving carried traffic, reducing the benefit of aggressive
  transition-aware routing. These results support BD-TPAR as a practical default under fragmented deployment, GMR-T as a lower-complexity alternative, and TPAR
  or GFJ only where the external cost of transitions is high.

AI.tldr: 研究混合HCF/SMF网络中路由权衡，提出过渡感知路由方案。
AI.motivation: 解决HCF在SMF网络中增量部署时，减少HCF-SMF过渡次数与路径绕行之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: 使用事件驱动模拟器，比较六种保护路由方案，包括光纤盲、GSNR感知和显式过渡感知设计；模型包含每过渡GSNR惩罚和拼接故障可用性项。
AI.result: TPAR和GFJ将平均过渡次数减半，但承载流量损失20-25%；GMR-T减少约22%过渡，吞吐成本3%；BD-TPAR减少约11%过渡，成本仅1%。
AI.conclusion: BD-TPAR是碎片化部署下的实用默认方案，GMR-T是低复杂度替代，TPAR或GFJ仅适用于过渡外部成本高的场景。
AI.problem: 混合光纤网络中路由方案对过渡次数和承载流量的量化影响缺乏系统比较。
key_results: TPAR和GFJ将平均过渡次数减半，承载流量损失20-25%
GMR-T减少约22%过渡，吞吐成本3%
BD-TPAR减少约11%过渡，成本仅1%
连续HCF部署降低约40%过渡并改善承载流量
AI.baseline: 距离自适应路由与频谱分配(DA-RSA)
AI.measurement: 六种参考拓扑、五种HCF部署比例、动态负载300 Erlang；指标：平均过渡次数、承载流量损失百分比。

AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，该文不涉及GPU互联。

title: Assisting Mission-Critical Traffic Flows with Active Queue Management in Industrial Internet of Things
comment: Accepted by the Journal of Industrial Information Integration
summary: Mission-critical Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) traffic flows require bounded network latency and jitter guarantees to ensure the safe functioning of critical industrial infrastructure. These flows are typically communicated via commodity network routers with conventional First-In-First-Out (FIFO) buffers. FIFO has proven to be the culprit of the well-known bufferbloat phenomenon, and the deployment of Active Queue Management (AQM) schemes have demonstrated significant performance improvements for latency-sensitive applications over the Internet in the IT domain. However, the bufferbloat phenomenon and the efficacy of AQM schemes have not been studied in IIoT-based OT domain. In this paper, we propose the use of AQM as a lightweight and non-intrusive mechanism for assisting mission-critical traffic flows in IIoT networks. Our experimental results demonstrated that multi-queue AQM schemes provide substantial flow isolation and capacity sharing benefits, and significantly improve the performance of mission-critical traffic flows under network pressure. We further provide deployment recommendations based on our experimental insights.

AI.tldr: 研究AQM在IIoT网络中缓解缓冲膨胀，提升关键流延迟性能。
AI.motivation: IIoT关键流需要低延迟和抖动保证，但FIFO缓冲导致缓冲膨胀，AQM在IT域有效但在OT域未验证。
AI.method: 硬件平台：论文摘要未明确；关键技术：多队列AQM（如CoDel、FQ-CoDel）；实现层级：系统（网络层）。
AI.result: 多队列AQM显著改善关键流延迟和抖动，提供流隔离和容量共享，具体数值未给出。
AI.conclusion: AQM可作为轻量级机制提升IIoT关键流性能，建议部署多队列AQM。
AI.problem: 缓冲膨胀在IIoT OT域的影响及AQM有效性未经验证。
AI.key_results: 多队列AQM提供流隔离和容量共享；显著改善关键流性能（具体数值未给出）。
AI.measurement: 实验配置：IIoT网络压力场景；指标：延迟、抖动、流隔离。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，AQM可改善网络延迟，但非分布式推理核心问题。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不直接相关，但网络延迟改善对以太网环境有益。
AI.differentiation: 可考虑将AQM用于推理通信流，但非主要方向。
AI.deep_read_reason: 非A/B/C主类别，无系统级贡献，无量化结果，对7×Thor直接价值有限。

title: CARPRT: Class-Aware Zero-Shot Prompt Reweighting for Black-Box Vision-Language Models
summary: Pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) enable zero-shot image classification by computing the similarity score between an image and textual descriptions, typically formed by inserting a class label (e.g., "cat") into a prompt (e.g., "a photo of a"). Since the score for a given image-class pair is sensitive to the choice of prompt, existing studies ensemble multiple prompts using a weighting vector to aggregate scores across different prompts. Yet, in current strategies, the weighting vector assigned to each prompt is shared across all classes, implicitly assuming that prompts are conditionally independent of classes, which often does not hold in practice, as a prompt like "an aerial view of" might be apt for "airport" but ill-suited for "apple". To address this, we propose class-aware zero-shot prompt reweighting (CARPRT). This scoring scheme adjusts the weighting vector for each class label by capturing the class-specific relevance of different prompts in a training-free manner. For each class label and every available prompt, we quantify their class-specific relevance by averaging image-text relevance scores over images predicted to that class under the given prompt. These estimates are then normalized to derive class-specific weights. Evaluations on standard image classification benchmarks show that CARPRT outperforms existing class-independent reweighting methods, confirming that modeling prompt-class dependencies is crucial for effective zero-shot prediction and even broader VLM-based application settings that rely on prompt ensembling. Our code is available at https://github.com/tmlr-group/CARPRT.

AI.tldr: 提出类感知零样本提示重加权方法，提升VLM分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有提示集成方法对所有类别共享权重，忽略了提示与类别的条件依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出CARPRT，对每个类别和提示，通过平均图像-文本相关性分数计算类特定权重，无需训练。
AI.result: 在标准图像分类基准上，CARPRT优于现有类无关重加权方法。
AI.conclusion: 建模提示-类别依赖对零样本预测至关重要。
AI.problem: 现有提示集成方法假设提示与类别条件独立，导致次优性能。
AI.key_results: 在标准图像分类基准上，CARPRT优于现有类无关重加权方法。
AI.baseline: 现有类无关重加权方法。
AI.measurement: 标准图像分类基准，指标为分类准确率。
AI.value_7xthor: 关联有限，该论文聚焦VLM零样本分类，不涉及分布式推理系统。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 不适用，该论文不涉及分布式推理。
AI.deep_read_reason: 该论文为VLM零样本分类方法，不涉及分布式推理系统，对7×Jetson Thor无直接可迁移价值。

title: Don't Predict, Prioritize: Rethinking GPU Reliability Assessment
comment: Accepted at ACM SIGKDD 2026; 13 pages, 13 figures
summary:
The reliability of Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) is a criticalbottleneck for modern large-scale AI infrastructure, where a sin-gle node failure can disrupt synchronous training jobs and causesignificant financial losses. While predictive maintenance is widelyused in other hardware domains, we demonstrate that accuratelypredicting the exact timing of GPU failures is inherently difficult.Through an in-depth analysis of telemetry data from a productioncluster, we find that major GPU failures, including Double Bit Er-rors (DBEs) and GPU Lost events, exhibit strong stochasticity andlow signal-to-noise ratios in time-series telemetry, which makesconventional time-based prediction ineffective.
  This insight motivates a paradigm shift: instead of attempting topredict the absolute timing of a failure, we propose a more robustapproach focused on ranking nodes by their relative failure risk. Wepropose HeaRank (Health Rank), a Learning-to-Rank (LTR) frame-work that leverages stable historical failure patterns to computea global risk ranking of GPU nodes. Evaluated on a production-scale cluster with thousands of GPUs, HeaRank achieves an AUCof 0.83, significantly outperforming both heuristic baselines andstate-of-the-art ranking algorithms. In online deployment, HeaRanksuccessfully captures 64% of future failures within the top 5% ofranked nodes, compared to only 21% by the incumbent productionsystem. These results suggest that relative risk ranking can serveas a robust alternative in environments where absolute failure pre-diction is inherently limited. Our work highlights the importanceof risk-aware scheduling and proactive resource management inmodern GPU clusters.

AI.tldr: 提出相对风险排序框架HeaRank，替代绝对故障时间预测，提升GPU集群容错调度。
AI.motivation: GPU故障时间预测因随机性和低信噪比而困难，导致同步训练中断和巨大损失。
AI.method: 基于生产集群遥测数据，采用Learning-to-Rank框架HeaRank，利用历史故障模式计算节点全局风险排序。
AI.result: AUC 0.83；在线部署中，前5%高风险节点捕获64%未来故障，对比生产系统仅21%。
AI.conclusion: 相对风险排序可作为绝对故障预测的鲁棒替代方案，支持风险感知调度。
AI.problem: 现有GPU故障预测方法依赖精确时间预测，但实际遥测数据随机性强、信噪比低，预测效果差。
key_results: AUC=0.83，优于启发式基线和SOTA排序算法
在线部署：前5%高风险节点捕获64%未来故障，生产系统仅21%
AI.baseline: 启发式基线和state-of-the-art排序算法；生产系统（incumbent production system）。
AI.measurement: 生产集群数千GPU；指标：AUC、故障捕获率（前5%节点）；在线部署评估。
AI.value_7xthor: 可借鉴HeaRank的相对风险排序思想，在7×Thor集群中基于遥测数据（如温度、功耗）进行节点健康排序，指导任务迁移或检查点触发。
AI.nvlink_free_holds: 成立。相对风险排序不依赖高速互联，仅需节点遥测数据，适用于无NVLink的以太网环境。
AI.differentiation: 在7×Thor上实现轻量级节点健康排序，结合边缘集群的有限遥测数据，设计风险感知的推理任务调度与弹性恢复策略。
AI.deep_read_reason: 论文聚焦GPU故障预测而非推理系统容错，且未涉及通信、并行或KV cache机制，对7×Thor直接迁移价值有限。
